title: Kiruna Heavy Rain
lead: Kiruna is experiencing heavy rain with a Z-Score of -3.34, indicating a significant anomaly. The Score of 10.0/10 and CRITICAL level signify extreme weather conditions.
body:
The heavy rain in Kiruna is causing disruptions to daily life. 
 The high Umidita of 97% and low Vento of 4.0 km/h are exacerbating the situation. 
 The HDD of 12.7 GG and CDD of 0.0 GG indicate a significant impact on heating and energy consumption.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols immediately to mitigate the effects of the heavy rain.
